---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug, new
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**  
When submitting an issue or bug report, please follow these guidelines to help us address it more efficiently:

1. **Descriptive Title**  
   Choose a clear, concise title that reflects the problem.

2. **One Bug Per Issue**  
   If you have multiple bugs to report, please create separate issues for each.

3. **Update First**  
   Confirm you're using the latest version of Godot Launcher, in case the issue has already been resolved.

4. **Search Before Posting**  
   Check the existing [open](https://github.com/godotlauncher/launcher/issues) and [closed](https://github.com/godotlauncher/launcher/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aclosed) issues to see if your bug has already been reported. If you're unsure, feel free to open a new issue.

---

**To Reproduce**  
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**  
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**  
If applicable, add screenshots to help illustrate the problem.

**Platform**  
- OS: [e.g. Windows/macOS/Linux Distro]  
- Version: [e.g. 10]  

**Godot Launcher Version**  
Which version of Godot Launcher did you encounter this bug on?  
- Version number: [e.g. 1.1.0]

Have you tested on the latest version?  
- Latest version number: [e.g. 1.1.0]

**Regression**  
Is this something that used to work in a previous version?  
- yes/no

Which previous version(s) have you tested where this bug did not occur? 
- yes/no 
- Previous version with no bug: [e.g. 1.0.0]
